title: Witchcraft and Curses
description: Channel the power of enchantment magic to perform rituals
body:
Witchcraft and Curses allows you to channel enchantment magic to perform rituals which reward the caster with powerful effects.

Rituals can be performed using the Deepslate Basin surrounded by enchantment power supplying blocks (bookshelves, and various decoration blocks that the mod adds).

The mod also adds a new Biome and tree type, the Wilted Woods and the Wilted wood type.

This mod was made for https://spooky-jam.com/ 2025.
